name: reliq-context-engine
description: Task-scoped context, scoped memory, and cognition tooling for Reliq and other AI systems.

interface.shortDescription: Context, memory, and cognition for AI systems.
interface.longDescription: Builds minimal structured context from wiki knowledge, optional FAISS retrieval, and scoped user/system/session memory so agents can work without chat-history prompt stuffing.
defaultPrompt: Build context for this implementation task.
Search scoped memory for this debugging issue.
Generate a cognition payload for this feature request.
Show scheduler and dashboard status for this local Reliq node.
Run the lightweight research swarm for this goal.
